message: feat: 지연 태스크 감지 알림 파이프라인 추가 및 깃허브 워크플로우 업데이트

files.content:
name: HANSL Notion & Slack Automation Scheduler

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pipeline_type:
        description: '실행할 파이프라인 타입을 선택하세요.'
        required: true
        default: 'daily'
        type: choice
        options:
          - daily
          - daily-reminder
          - weekly
          - overdue-tasks


jobs:
  run-pipeline:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write # 깃허브 저장소에 MD 파일을 자동으로 커밋/푸시하기 위해 쓰기 권한 활성화

    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run Automation Pipeline
        env:
          NOTION_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NOTION_TOKEN }}
          NOTION_WEEKLY_PLAN_DB_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTION_WEEKLY_PLAN_DB_ID }}
          NOTION_DAILY_WORK_LOG_DB_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTION_DAILY_WORK_LOG_DB_ID }}
          NOTION_TASKS_DB_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTION_TASKS_DB_ID }}
          NOTION_TEAM_MEMBERS_DB_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTION_TEAM_MEMBERS_DB_ID }}
          SLACK_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN }}
          SLACK_USER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SLACK_USER_TOKEN }}
          SLACK_TEAM_ID: ${{ secrets.SLACK_TEAM_ID }}
          SLACK_CHANNEL_ID: ${{ secrets.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID }}
          SLACK_ADMIN_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.SLACK_ADMIN_USER_ID }}
          SLACK_CANVAS_ID_YUNHUI: ${{ secrets.SLACK_CANVAS_ID_YUNHUI }}
          SLACK_CANVAS_ID_HEESEUNG: ${{ secrets.SLACK_CANVAS_ID_HEESEUNG }}
          SLACK_CANVAS_ID_HYUNBIN: ${{ secrets.SLACK_CANVAS_ID_HYUNBIN }}
          SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
          SUPABASE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_KEY }}
        run: |
          TYPE="${{ github.event.inputs.pipeline_type }}"
          echo "🚀 [트리거 실행] 선택된 파이프라인: $TYPE"
          if [ "$TYPE" = "weekly" ]; then
            node -e "require('./src/app').executeWeeklyPipeline()"
          elif [ "$TYPE" = "daily-reminder" ]; then
            node -e "require('./src/app').executeDailyReminderPipeline()"
          elif [ "$TYPE" = "overdue-tasks" ]; then
            node -e "require('./src/app').executeOverdueTasksReminderPipeline()"
          else
            node -e "require('./src/app').executeDailyPipeline()"
          fi

      - name: Commit and Push Archived Reports
        run: |
          git config --global user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config --global user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          
          # 생성된 docs/ 폴더가 있다면 트래킹 추가
          git add docs/ || true
          
          # 변경사항이 있는 경우에만 커밋/푸시 진행
          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo "📝 새롭게 저장할 마크다운 보고서가 없습니다."
          else
            echo "📝 새 마크다운 보고서를 깃허브 저장소에 기록합니다."
            git commit -m "chore: [자동 아카이브] 일일/주간 업무 보고서 보존"
            git push
          fi
